package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for shared_package_named_common_base_utils_with_mixed_exports: Generic packages that mix services, models, DTOs, validators, and queries behind one broad shared namespace.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule187NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule187NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule187NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario187Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule187NegativeService, input Rule187NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
